Petition For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-15-2002 Continued To Mar-14-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Benjamin T. Rosenfeld, Esq., 415-285-8091, appeared on behalf of petitioner and moving party James Broustis. Rosa Maria Sanchez, Esq., 415-554-4762, appeared on behalf of the City and County of San Francisco, the Department of Parking and Traffic, and the San Francisco Police Department.

After argument the court issued an alternative writ: the Department of Parking and Traffic and/or the San Francisco Police Department shall not sell vehicle. On March 14, 2002, the City and County shall show cause as to why the vehicle shall not be returned with fees and fines voided. Parties shall meet and confer on a briefing schedule for this hearing. (JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
